from appium import webdriver
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
import time

# Initialize driver (assuming driver is already initialized)
driver = None  # Replace with actual driver instance

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

# 1. View widget - wait for widget to be visible
widget_element = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "widget_id")))
widget_element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "widget_id")))

# 2. Click widget
driver.find_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "widget_id").click()

# 3. View corner - wait for corner element to be visible
corner_element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "corner_id")))

# 4. Click top content
driver.find_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "top_content_id").click()

# 5. Set reminder
driver.find_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "set_reminder_id").click()

# Wait for reminder dialog to appear
wait.

from appium import webdriver
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

# Wait for Trial Corner element and click
trial_corner_element = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
    EC.presence_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "Trial Corner"))
)
trial_corner_element.click()

# Wait for Manage Trial element and click
manage_trial_element = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
    EC.presence_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "Manage Trial"))
)
manage_trial_element.click()
WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((AppiumBy.XPATH, "//android.widget.TextView[@text='Pause Trial']"))).click()

from appium import webdriver
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

# Initialize driver (assuming driver is already initialized)
driver = webdriver.Remote("http://localhost:4723/wd/hub", {"appPackage": "in.stage.dev", "platformName": "Android"})

wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

# Step 1: Create user account with trial active on Day 2
# Tap on sign up button
wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "sign_up_button"))).click()

from appium import webdriver
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

# Initialize driver (assuming driver is already initialized)
# Create new user account with trial
wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)

# Tap on sign up / create account button
create_account_btn = wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "create_account")))
create_account_btn.click()

# Enter username
username_field = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "username_field")))
username_field.send_keys("new_user")

# Enter email
email_field = wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, "email_field")))
email_field.send_keys("user@example.com")

# Enter password

password_field.send_keys("Password123!")

confirm_password_field.click()
confirm_password_field.send_keys("Password123!")
